name: com.cupkekgames.gamesave.luna
description: Luna UI bindings for CupkekGames GameSave: generic abstract bases (MainMenuView<TSaveData,TSaveMetadata>, GameSaveViewList<TSaveData,TSaveMetadata>) plus the concrete UIViewComponent helpers (GameSaveView, GameSaveViewEntry, AutoSaveView, VersionLabelController) that wire a slot-based save manager into a Luna UI panel. Subclass these in your game with concrete TSaveData/TSaveMetadata types.
